item.description: Big Yamaha receiver and Polk audio speakers and powered sub with center channel speaker, everything is in very good condition.

item.description: Fisher stereo system: AM/FM tuner (works great!). turntable (not tested). 8-track (not tested). cassette player (not tested).

item.title: Sony STR-DE185 Stereo Receiver - $30 (Exeter)
item.description: Good working receiver with remote control. Rated 100x2. Clean unit, but does have some scratches. Nice 2-channel unit.

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set wih Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $400 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Sherwood RA-1145R stereo - $50 (Warwick)
item.description: Sherwood RA-1145R amp receiver

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: NAD 50 Watt per Channel CD/DVD Receiver with Remote - $50 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful NAD L53 Receiver that plays CDs and has AM/FM tuner. It also plays DVDs but has no HDMI out so only hooks up to older TVs. Works great for music. 50 watts per channel and sounds great. Remote control, AM antenna and owners manual included. Works perfectly. I can demonstrate it in my garage. Cool unit for $50 firm.

item.title: Rotel RB-1050 stereo power amplifier - $150 (Northkingstown)
item.description: Selling a Rotel RB-1050 stereo power amplifier for $150. This is a well-regarded, high-quality amp known for delivering clean, dynamic sound. Ideal for an audiophile setup or home theater system.

item.title: Onkyo rack system - $220 (Tiverton)
item.description: Audio Video Control amplifier, AM/FM receiver, 6 disc CD changer,

item.title: Complete Stereo System - $225 (Middletown)
item.description: ONKYO TX SR501/AV Stereo Receiver, ONKYO TA RW344 Stereo Tape Deck, PANASONIC Compact Disk Changer, pair of POLK AUDIO Model S6 Woodgrain Speakers (10"W x 21"H). Includes owner's manuals and remote controls. Excellent Condition

item.description: BRAND NEW IN BOX

item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Emotiva BASX PT-100 preamp stereo audophile sound system - $300 (Providence)
item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.title: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player - $80 (Cranston)
item.description: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player

item.title: HITATCHI D550 CASSETTE DECK - $99 (Foster)
item.description: HITATCHI D550 CASSETTE DECK

item.title: Huge Cerwin Vega CLS-215 Stereo Speakers - $499 (Providence)
item.description: Beautiful pair of Cerwin Vega CLS-215 stereo speakers in excellent condition. 3 way with dual 15" woofers. These are very efficient speakers that sound amazing. With sensitivity of 97dB at one watt/meter, they can be driven easily by low power amps and also can handle up to 500 watts per channel of power! There are positive reviews online. These are like new with a little dust on them. Owners manual included. These were a bargain at $1000 new per pair and are a great deal at $499 firm.

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: Sony SS-H3300 Stereo Speakers - $59 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful pair of Sony SS-H3300 stereo speakers in excellent condition and sound fantastic. 3 way speakers with 5" woofer, 1" tweeter and 13/16" super tweeter. I have them hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great speakers for $59 firm.

item.title: Sansui D-X311WR Auto-Reverse Dual Cassette Deck - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Sansui D-X311WR auto-reverse dual cassette deck. Has Dolby B&C noise reduction and an MPX filter. Very nice condition. Works and is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Cool blast from the past for $49 firm.

item.title: I Buy Vintage Stereo Equipment - Receivers, Speakers Etc... - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: I like to buy, tinker with and collect vintage stereo equipment. I like old receivers, speakers, turntables, tape decks, cd players etc... I'll even buy some broken stuff (depending what it is). Let me know what you have and where it is located. You can email me through craigslist or call or text the phone number that comes up when you click "reply" at the top left corner of my ad. Thanks, Bill

item.title: Vintage Magnavox Micromatic Suitcase Stereo Record Player - $30 (Cranston)
item.description: Cool old Magnavox Micromatic solid state record player. Excellent cosmetic condition but needs work. Selling as a project. Super cool looking unit for $30 firm.

item.title: Technics SL-L20 Linear Tracking Turntable - $150 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Technics SL-L20 linear tracking automatic turntable in excellent condition and working great. Sleek looking and easy to use. Sounds fantastic. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Brand new belt. Sweet table for $150 firm.

item.title: Gemini TT-900WW bluetooth turntable - $75 (Johnston)
item.description: Gemini TT-900WW Modern Bluetooth Turntable System.

item.title: Victrola turntable 6 in 1 - $75 (Johnston)
item.description: Victrola 6-in-1 Turntable, a multimedia center designed to play various audio formats with a vintage aesthetic

item.title: Vtg 80's Ghetto Blaster Boom Box GE Dual Cassette Radio - $50 (Johnston)
item.description: 1 year ago I took the front cover off to try to fix the cassette players. Belts were missing, deteriorated. I bought new ones, but lost interest in putting this back to working condition. So here it is, with the cover open, with new belts in baggie waiting to be installed.I dont have time to figure it out. None of the electronics are un-soldered, just un screwed plastics.. Its just taken apart where the screws were. Vintage 80's Radio and equalizer all work fine.

item.description: From estate I bought

item.description: Barely used analog cassette recorder with manual and original packing.

item.title: Kenwood AM-FM Radio Receiver KR-A4040 - $75 (Westerly)
item.description: Vintage - one owner

item.title: KLH-9912 Stereo Speaker Pair - $40 (North Scituate)
item.description: KLH-9912 Stereo Speaker Pair 8 Ohms 250 Watts Per Channel. Floor speaks. Cases scratched and a few dents, one front screen missing. However they still work great! $40 obo

item.title: Sony AV Receiver - $50 (North Scituate)
item.description: Sony AV Receiver STR-K7000. Good working condition. Original remote. $50 obo

item.title: Ion USB turntable - $50 (Providence)
item.description: Ion USB turntable model TTUSB10. Includes USB connection for converting vinyl records to audio files, as well as RCA connections. In excellent working condition.

item.title: NAD 7255PE AM/FM Stereo Integrated Amplfier - $175 (Cranston)
item.description: The NAD 7225PE is an integrated amplifier with AM/FM stereo tuner introduced in 1988. Features 25 W per channel, two sets of speaker outputs, built-in phono preamp for a turnable connection. Output was measured to be ~32 - 36W per channel and sounds great!

item.title: Working Garrard Type A & Elac Miracord - For Restoration - $30 (NORTH PROVIDENCE)
item.description: Please See Photos. Also have videos of each turntable working.

item.description: Great pedal, massive sounding fuzz

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack / Realistic / Micronta Hoard - $150 (Wrentham)
item.description: This is all stuff that I've used at some point in my distant past. Everything is branded as indicated. It is all at least 35 years old and everything works except the 12" speakers. Included in the lot:

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.title: Yamaha HTR-5540 Surround Receiver - $35 (Exeter)
item.description: Good working, clean Yamaha 5-channel receiver. Comes with the original remote (not shown but included). Sounds good and looks good.

item.title: Magnavox concert grand - $900 (Barrington)
item.description: 1959 Magnavox concert grand. This was electronically restored before I bought it six years ago. Sounds absolutely incredible. The turntable will need some work. Currently stuck on one speed and manual.

item.title: Mitsubishi cassette deck - $65
item.description: I want to sell a cassette deck right away

item.description: BOSE SMART SOUNDBAR 900: Premium Bose voice control soundbar. Two custom-engineered upfiring dipole speakers work with Bose technologies to make it feel as if sound is coming from every direction -- even overhead

item.title: KS-A16K JVC - $40 (North Providence)
item.description: Ks-a16k jvc Stereo power Amplifier new in box. If you have any questions feel free to contact me.

item.title: MAGNAVOX STEREO CONSOLE RECORD PLAYER - $100 (West Warwick)
item.description: USED IT FOR QUITE A WHILE LOVE THE ALBUM SOUND OF MUSIC.

item.title: Mackie 16 Chanel mixing board - $200 (North kingstown)
item.description: Mackie mixer in great condition . Everything works. Also available hard case , rack mount compressor, and stereo equalizer.

item.title: Bluetooth Speaker - $30 (Woonsocket)
item.description: Wireless stereo Bluetooth connectivity

item.title: Vizio Sound Bar - $75 (Woonsocket)
item.description: VIZIO Sound Bar used works great has cosmetic issues but doesn't affect sound, remote missing back.

item.title: Yamaha YDP-101S Digital Piano - $250 (Chepachet)
item.description: 88-key keyboard

item.title: New FMS PA-18 RC Plane - $200 (Barrington)
item.description: New FMS plane ready to fly, never flown. Reflex V3, Spektrum AR620 Receiver. Assembled and ready to fly.

item.title: HUGE YARD SALE (Penbryn Ave, smithfield)
item.description: Huge yard sale... something for everyone... clothes, knick knacks, collectibles, fire trucks, baseball cards, hats, stereo equipment and speakers, tools, dungeons and Dragons, vintage toys, video games, consoles... and sooo much more!!! Penbry Ave in smithfield... come on by. Ask if you don't see something you're looking for as not everything is out.

item.title: Pristine Vintage Sansui AU-7500 Integrated Amplifier - $599 (Cranston)
item.description: This is a beautiful Sansui AU-7500 stereo integrated amplifier from circa 1972 in supreme condition. Obtained from the original owner. Works great and sounds amazing. I had it checked out by my tech and all is good. He lubed a few controls for good measure. Has 2 phono inputs. Printed brochure with specs and schematic included. It is hooked up for demonstration. Gorgeous unit for $599 firm.

item.title: Large yard sale w/lots of Halloween SUNDAY 8/24/25 (richmond)
item.description: POSTPONED TO SUNDAY the 24th. We are having a large yard sale Saturday from 8am to late afternoon. So much stuff..totes full of Halloween decorations and costumes, full rubber latex masks etc from the 1990's, vinyl LP's and 45's, clothes, magazines, comics, stereo equipment, turntables, Bruce Lee posters from 1973, some furniture, tools, brewerania items, beer signs, collectibles, portable generator, cd's, dvd's, books, 1950's croquet set, antique mantle clock, 2 person inflatable boat by Intel Challenger 2, antique shovels, Weber Q grill w/stand, fishing gear and too much more to mention. Most items are older but there will be some newer things as well. Definitely not your run of the mill, generic yard sale and if you don't see it, we may have it. If you only go to one sale Saturday, this is the one you don't want to miss. I will try to post some pics if time allows.

item.description: First, a 2015 Grand Design Reflection 293RES 5th wheel, 3-slide RV.

item.description: > Six channel powered mixer in ergonomically correct kickback enclosure allowing you to easily see and operate the front panel functions.

item.title: Altec Lansing RM 3010 Amplified Speaker System Monitor New in Box - $75 (Seekonk)
item.description: Altec Lansing RM 3010 Amplified Speaker System Monitor New in Box

item.title: 2023 Coachmen Prism Elite 24mb - $115,000 (Warwick)
item.description: This 2023 Prism Elite is loaded. It is built on a 2022 Mercedes chassis. The Mercedes V6 3.0L diesel engine has 1,800 miles. The one thing that it came with that we didn't like was the murphy bed which covered the window. We replaced it with theatre reclining seats, as we prefer to sleep in a reclining position. These are extremely comfortable cloth recliners. If you prefer a bed, the theatre recliners can be replaced with a sleep sofa.

item.title: AKG Perception wireless 45 instrumental set - $70 (swansea)
item.description: Original owner, used only twice, ended up I didn't need it.

item.title: 2009 travel Trailer - $8,500 (Attleboro Ma)
item.description: 2009 Jayco Jay Flight 27ft lightweight travel trailer sleeps 6 no leaks everything works lots of storage Needs new Awning Queen size Bed Full size bunk and twin upper bunk dinette that turns into a bed no couch extra counter space microwave,stove ,

item.title: korg 168RC Digital Mixer - $250 (Warwick)
item.description: one of a kind Korg digital mixer with 2 xlr and 6 1/4" inputs, plus 2 lightpipe (toslink) in/out connections ( 8 channel ) providing 16in 16out over digital, stereo out for mains, stereo out for aux monitor plus headphone out

item.title: Harman Kardon Soundsticks II Speaker System - $100 (Newport)
item.description: Self-Powered Satellite Speakers and Subwoofer System

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $75 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.title: Radio control cosair airplane - $80 (Tiverton)
item.description: Great planes corsair radio control airplane receiver ready uses 2200 lipo battery has plug in landing gear never used.

item.title: Radio control airplane - $75 (Tiverton)
item.description: This is a radio control airplane. Receiver ready never used . Made for 22 lipo battery , not included Local pick up only.

item.title: 2017 freedom food truck / trailer - $42,000 (Richmond)
item.description: For sale

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $15,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.description: Receivers collectable on sale in Music House of Flea Market big Top, reasonable price.

item.title: CHARLESTOWN RI HUGE-SAT 8/2 & SUN 8/3 9-3 (Charlestown)
item.description: Huge yard sale in in Charlestown near the town hall Saturday, August 2 and Sunday, August 3 starts 9AM to 3PM. we have 50 years of accumulation, antiques collectibles, unusual items, kitchen and household items. No items for children no early birds. with: 12 or more antique stained glass windows, large parrot cage, Allagash canoe, smoker, vintage post office boxes, antique humidor, antique print trays, Small unusual corner shaped white sink, lots of tools, round pedestal oak dining room table, folding poker card table, lots of lamps, tables, antique birdcages, old stereos and speakers, chairs- wood rocking and other kinds, pictures and frames, toolboxes, antique wooden drying racks, antique scales, Dodge ram van rims, 2 sets of Buick wheel covers from a 1984 Park Ave. a wire set and a regular set, crocks, ab lounger exerciser, even the kitchen sink and Santa Claus

item.title: (2) SHURE ULXD4Q - Digital Wireless Receivers (w/ Microphones) - $8,000 (Providence)
item.description: (2) Like-New Shure ULXD4Q digital wireless receivers with (2) Shure SM58 wireless microphones. Used lightly in an auditorium space, no road use/wear. All powers on, includes surge protector.
